name: Applike Group
description: Hamburg app economy company builder behind Adjoe, Sunday, Justdice and Justtrack for app monetization and growth.

seo.title: Applike Group — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Applike Group: Hamburg app economy company builder behind Adjoe, Sunday, Justdice and Justtrack for app monetization and growth.

when_to_use: Monetizing apps via playtime-based offerwall through Adjoe SDK
Acquiring high-LTV users via Sunday's AI bidding for mobile games
Tracking cross-network UA performance via Justtrack unified dashboard
Rewarding users with game currency for engagement via Justdice offerwall

pros: Owns full stack: SDK, MMP, DSP, offerwall
Adjoe rewarded playtime drives strong eCPMs
cons: You deal with multiple sub-brands separately
Product sprawl can confuse first-time buyers
review.verdict: Powerful portfolio if you use multiple products, but integrations feel less unified than a single platform.
review.best_for: Mobile game publishers wanting a European alternative to AppLovin's full stack.
review.not_for: Non-gaming apps or teams wanting one SDK, one contract, one dashboard.
